% This is generated by ESQL's SparklineTests. Do not edit it. See docs/reference/query-languages/esql/README.md for how to regenerate it.

## Example

```esql
FROM employees
| STATS sparkline = SPARKLINE(COUNT(*), hire_date, 20, "1985-01-01T00:00:00Z", "1985-12-31T00:00:00Z")
```

| sparkline:long |
| --- |
| [0, 2, 0, 0, 1, 0, 1, 0, 1, 2, 4, 0] |
